Event: The Supreme Sorcery Festival
Event Date: 01/08/2023
Sage Bot Item Code: AR137


Other locations the gear can be found
Red Dragon
Mystic Dragon
Guardian of the Dozen Blades

Once in a while, the armor wearer gains a shield that removes 2 negative effects and absorbs 200000 damage of any type. The shield lasts for 4 sec. When the shield wears off, all enemies in a small radius around the armor take 130000 physical damage.

Requirements: 98-100
